description: Daily power-user lens: portfolio triage, vendor assessment, questionnaires, remediation chase.

stops.label: home-vrm
stops.note: The VRM workspace tab: does the default view answer 'which vendors moved this week'?

stops.label: portfolios
stops.note: Portfolio management: tiering, saved views, and whether a 1,400-vendor book is manageable here.

stops.label: my-vendors
stops.note: The vendor list: filtering, bulk actions, score-change visibility, path from list to action.

stops.label: vendor-scorecard
stops.note: A vendor's scorecard: evidence quality, attribution trust, and what I'd send the vendor from here.

stops.label: questionnaires
stops.note: Atlas questionnaires: does this reduce questionnaire fatigue? How does it connect to the rating?

stops.label: action-plans
stops.note: Remediation collaboration: can I set SLAs, chase vendors, and prove closure to auditors?

stops.label: vendor-detection
stops.note: Automatic Vendor Detection: fourth-party/concentration visibility — signal or noise?

stops.label: requests-log
stops.note: Requests log: audit trail quality for regulator/exam evidence.
